title: AD-SDLC Feature Flags Configuration
description: Schema for .ad-sdlc/config/feature-flags.yaml. The file is opt-in: AD-SDLC never auto-creates it. Each flag may be omitted; missing flags fall through to lower-priority sources (env, CLI, default).

version.description: Schema version (semver). Optional; reserved for future migrations.

flags.description: Feature flag values. Currently only useSdkForWorker is recognized.

useSdkForWorker.description: When true, route the worker stage through ExecutionAdapter (SDK path). Default: false. See AD_SDLC_USE_SDK_FOR_WORKER.
